title: smooth pvp pack
description: This modpack only for boost your fps make your gamplay experience best
body:
The Boost FPS Modpack for Fabric is a powerful performance enhancement tool designed specifically for Minecraft players using the Fabric modding framework. This modpack integrates a collection of performance-boosting mods to significantly increase FPS (frames per second), resulting in smoother gameplay, even on lower-end or older hardware.

Working seamlessly with the Fabric API, the modpack includes mods like Lithium, Phosphor, and Starlight—each focused on optimizing specific aspects of the game. Lithium optimizes the game's core mechanics and entities, reducing unnecessary CPU load, while Phosphor improves Minecraft’s lighting engine for faster chunk loading and smoother world rendering. Starlight focuses on improving the block lighting system, reducing lag related to block updates.

Additionally, OptiFabric, an OptiFine-like mod for Fabric, is included, enabling more fine-tuned graphical settings such as adjusting render distance, quality, and visual effects. The modpack also incorporates memory and thread optimizations, further boosting performance.

This combination of mods works together to streamline Minecraft’s performance, reducing lag and stuttering, while allowing users to maintain a good balance between visual quality and smooth gameplay. For anyone playing Minecraft on the Fabric platform looking to improve performance, this modpack is the ideal solution for better FPS and an overall enhanced gaming experience.
